item.title: MyPerformances

item.title: MyCollection
item.description: Ukulele *2 1.no brand Ukulele 2.OHANA CK-10 acoustic guitar YAMAHA FG800 electric guitar Fender Player Telecaster electric bass Mint Green, Fender Musicmaster 1997 bass Daphne Blue, Sterling by Music Man Short Scale StingRay bass amp Fender Rumble 15 Piano KAWAI MIDI Controler AKAI Professional Mini MK3

item.title: Nothing yet
item.description: Hello my friend! Since I just lauch my blog, I have no blog articles about my life yet. I’m really sorry about that. I will update and post more in the future. :)

item.title: About Me
item.description: Basic infos Age: 22 year old Gender: female I’m a— current cs student. mediocre musickmaker and guitar/bass player. I can also paly drum libertarian and feminist. I help my fellow women and endeavor to eliminate gender inequality. I have— two cats! I love them so much. a B.A. degree in English at Nanjing University. Turns out that I don’t like studying literature. But I haven’t figuire out what I like at the time.
